# Welcome

Discuss adaptive GitHub repository coordination for software, documentation,
writing, research, data, operations, publishing, and mixed work.

Useful topics include installation, agent access, inventories, portfolio review,
cross-repository routing, tool fit, safety, and portable Agent Skills behavior.

Before posting, remove private repository names, account details, organization
configuration, client information, local paths, and credentials.
